p2Plan.planComment:
Includes but not limited to:
Annual Discharge Plan - BC ENV
Nitrogen Management Plan - BC ENV
Water Management Plan - BC EMLI
Environmental Emergency Response Plan - BC ENV and ECCC (MDMER)
